note: First Pentium-M ThinkPad; T40/T41/T42 share this platform.

T460s uses 16 GB soldered LPDDR3 — not upgradeable.
T480 is the last T-series with a removable battery + 2.5″ bay + 2 SODIMM — a resale favorite.

model: T14 Gen 5 / T14s Gen 5 / T16 Gen 3
note: T14 Gen 5 returns to 2 real SO-DIMM slots (up to 64 GB). T14s Gen 5 is soldered LPDDR5x.
Last X with classic 7-row keyboard — enthusiast favorite.
Last X with removable battery + 2.5″ bay.
First Win 11-eligible X1 Carbon (8th gen). Great value used.
Switched to 16:10 display; max RAM up to 32 GB.
Lunar Lake caps on-package memory at 32 GB (down from Gen 11/12's 64).
P1 = the thin ('X1 Extreme') workstation. Gen 1 = 2018, Gen 2 = 2019.
